mainEntity.name: How do I track if my LA law firm appears in Perplexity searches?
mainEntity.text: How do I track if my LA law firm appears in Perplexity searches?

acceptedAnswer.text: Track LA law firm Perplexity visibility using alerts for branded queries, manual searches on 'lawyer [practice] Los Angeles,' and tools like Ahrefs AI monitor.

suggestedAnswer.text: Set Google Alerts for 'yourfirm Perplexity,' query Perplexity weekly, and use SEMrush Position Tracking for AI SERPs. Benchmark against competitors. LA firms should aim for 20% query citation rate within 6 months.

name: Tracking Perplexity Rankings for LA Firms
description: Track LA law firm Perplexity visibility using alerts for branded queries, manual searches on 'lawyer [practice] Los Angeles,' and tools like Ahrefs AI monitor.
